query:
SELECT invoiceNumber, lineAmount, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM billing_items
WHERE matchStatus != 'credit'
GROUP BY invoiceNumber, lineAmount
HAVING cnt > 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 10;
